---
title: "STAT_308_Project_Code"
author: "Justin Peabody"
date: "2026-04-12"
output: html_document
---

This is a file containing the R code I used to run the regression analyses and generate relevant visualizations for my STAT 308 final project.

```{}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{}

```


```{}

```

```{}
```
